mapper.select: SELECT id, name, mobile_number, email, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, name, mobile_number, email, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, name, mobile_number, email, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( name, mobile_number, email, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{mobileNumber}, #{email}, #{role}, #{isActive}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, mobile_number = #{mobileNumber}, email = #{email}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
